title: Rail Stenc Adoption Plan
description: Example single-document Stenc plan for adopting Stenc in Rail docs.

page.humanSummary: Adopt Stenc by converting a small set of canonical Rail docs first, then expand only after the template works for real runtime contracts.
page.agentSummary: Start from canonical specs and plans. Preserve Rail's source-of-truth hierarchy and add Stenc validation before broad migration.

body.goal: Make Rail specs and plans easier for humans to scan while keeping them structured enough for AI coding agents to follow.
body.architecture: Convert one canonical spec and one implementation plan into structured JSON, then render both through the fixed Stenc static app.

workerInstructions.note: Implement this plan task-by-task; each step remains trackable as a checkbox item in the source plan.

scopeCheck.assessment: This plan covers Stenc adoption examples and renderer support as one documentation workflow.
scopeCheck.decomposition: No subsystem split is required for this example plan.

body.currentState: Rail docs are plain Markdown with strong contracts but limited visual scanning support.
body.targetState: Rail docs use one JSON file per spec or plan and a fixed web page for human reading.

in: Thin AGENTS.md linkage if adopted in Rail

slices.title: Stenc templates

steps.title: Convert each template
steps.instruction: Convert each template to metadata, links, page, and body sections.

doneWhen: Templates validate as single-document JSON artifacts.

slices.title: Web app renderer

steps.title: Render pages
steps.instruction: Render spec and plan pages from nested body fields.

steps.title: Build examples app
steps.expected: Examples app HTML is regenerated from JSON.

doneWhen: Spec and plan pages build from JSON.

risks.risk: JSON becomes verbose for humans to author.
risks.mitigation: Keep each document scoped to one artifact and optimize rendering, not source looseness.

agentInstructions: Treat this as an adoption plan shape, not a Rail migration command.
Do not edit Rail runtime code while adopting docs templates.

selfReviewChecks.name: Spec coverage
selfReviewChecks.purpose: Confirm the adoption plan preserves the source-of-truth hierarchy and validation path.

selfReviewChecks.name: Placeholder scan
selfReviewChecks.purpose: Confirm no task relies on TBD or implicit follow-up work.

options.label: Subagent-Driven
options.description: Dispatch a fresh subagent per task and review between tasks.

options.label: Inline Execution
options.description: Execute tasks in this session using checkpointed plan execution.

supportingSections.heading: No Placeholders
supportingSections.content: Every step must contain concrete content, commands, or expected output before execution.
items: No TBD values in executable steps

blocks.title: JSON remains the source
blocks.body: Generated pages are reproducible views, not the document source.
